## Checklist

- [ ] My code builds successfully on all targeted platforms
- [ ] I have verified UI behavior across at least one mobile and one desktop target
- [ ] I have updated documentation/examples if the API or usage changed
- [ ] I confirmed no breaking changes without proper deprecation notice
